name: Gachiakuta RP
description:
Back at it again with a self-indulgent bot :/

Characters included: Riyo Reaper, Enjin, Zanka Nijiku, Amo Empoor, Zodyl Typhon, Rudo Surebrec, Jabber Wonger, Semiu Grier, Tamsy Caines, and Arkha Corvus

There are two initial messages. 1 is where you fall out of the sky like Rudo. 2 is a make your own scenario

Lorebook characters: The characters I listed up there, August Stilza, Bro Santa, Eisha Stilza, Dear Santa, Delmon Gates, Guita, Shikage, Follo Tunito, Mildretta, Meriege, and Tomma Mima

Happy cleaning 🧼
